name: vimeo
description: Push Descript exports from Google Drive into the existing Vimeo library. Activates for: (1) syncing multi-language captions to Vimeo videos, (2) updating Vimeo title and description, (3) replacing a Vimeo source file, (4) reconciling a Drive-to-Vimeo manifest.

vimeo_access_token.title: Vimeo Access Token
vimeo_access_token.description: Personal access token from your Vimeo developer app with scopes public private edit upload video_files

manifest_sheet_id.title: Manifest Google Sheet ID
manifest_sheet_id.description: Optional. If set, this Sheet is used as the manifest. If empty, /vimeo:setup creates one.

vimeo_test_video_id.title: Disposable Vimeo Test Video ID
vimeo_test_video_id.description: Optional. Used only by the documented manual end-to-end test.
